environment._NOTE_1_DATABASE: Default DB: context-index__llama-cpp__unsloth-embeddinggemma-300m-gguf__768__q8.sqlite (auto-derived from provider+model+dim+dtype; hf-local ONNX q8 is the fallback).
environment._NOTE_2_PROVIDERS: Auto cascade: VOYAGE_API_KEY -> OPENAI_API_KEY -> llama-cpp (GGUF Q8_0 + Metal) -> hf-local (ONNX q8 fallback).
environment._NOTE_3_EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER: Auto cascade: VOYAGE_API_KEY -> OPENAI_API_KEY -> llama-cpp (when GGUF runtime installed) -> hf-local. Set EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER=<provider> to force a specific provider.
environment._NOTE_4_CLOUD_PROVIDERS: For cloud: add VOYAGE_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY; Voyage uses rerank-2.5 and auto-selects the matching DB profile
environment._NOTE_7_FEATURE_FLAGS: Opt-out flags (default ON): SPECKIT_ADAPTIVE_FUSION, SPECKIT_SESSION_BOOST, SPECKIT_CAUSAL_BOOST, SPECKIT_HYDE_ACTIVE, SPECKIT_ENTITY_LINKING, SPECKIT_GRAPH_CONCEPT_ROUTING, SPECKIT_GRAPH_REFRESH_MODE=write_local. Tier 3 LLM save routing is always on (fail-open to Tier 2 on timeout).
environment._NOTE_8_CODE_GRAPH_SCOPE: Maintainer mode — opt-in all 5 .opencode/ folders (skills, agents, commands, specs, plugins) to the structural code graph. Per-call code_graph_scan args (includeSkills/Agents/Commands/Specs/Plugins) override these env defaults.
environment._NOTE_AUTO_MIGRATION: Auto-migration: hf-local sqlite + llama-cpp active -> daemon re-embeds + deletes source. Opt out: MEMORY_AUTO_MIGRATE_HF_TO_LLAMA=false.

environment._NOTE_2: Default embedding: google/embeddinggemma-300m (sentence-transformers, ~620MB, no API key)
environment._NOTE_3: If you switch to LiteLLM with VOYAGE_API_KEY, use voyage/voyage-code-3 for code embeddings
